final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an interior design visualization for a modern living room blending Nordic minimalism with Japanese wabi-sabi aesthetics.

Style/medium: architectural visualization render, photorealistic interior photography, clean 3D render with natural textures
Composition: wide-angle establishing shot from eye level, capturing the full living room layout, 24mm equivalent lens
Subject: low-profile linen off-white fabric sofa with assorted textured cushions, irregular natural stone coffee table with raw edges, tall fiddle-leaf fig plant in corner, slender arched floor lamp, curated bookshelf with select books and ceramic objects following minimalist principles
Scene/backdrop: spacious modern living room, large floor-to-ceiling windows with diffused green vegetation visible outside, light white oak hardwood flooring, matte white painted walls
Lighting/mood: abundant soft natural daylight streaming through windows, gentle diffused illumination, quiet and restrained zen atmosphere
Color palette: white and light gray as dominant base, warm off-white linen as anchor, natural wood tones as secondary, subtle green from plant as accent
Materials/textures: matte white plaster walls, light white oak wood grain flooring, coarse natural linen fabric, rough-hewn stone with organic edges, smooth ceramic glazes, glossy fiddle-leaf fig leaves
Constraints: adhere to wabi-sabi imperfection principles and Nordic functional minimalism; no clutter, only essential curated objects
Avoid: overly polished perfection, synthetic materials, bright saturated colors, harsh artificial lighting, cluttered surfaces, generic stock photo aesthetic
